subject: A walking mechanical construct shaped like a lantern or coffin, with a ring handle at the top, spindly articulated legs with claw-like feet, and a glowing blue gem embedded in its body that emits a sharp beam of blue-purple light
description: A mechanical automaton strides through a dim stone corridor. Its torso is shaped like an angular lantern or small coffin, capped with a circular ring handle at the top. The metal body has a warm rust-and-bronze patina. From a glowing blue gemstone set into the front of the body, a concentrated beam of blue-white and violet light shoots outward, scanning the space ahead. The construct moves on two thin, jointed legs that terminate in claw-like feet. The background reveals a castle interior — dark stone walls, brick columns, and a wet or reflective stone floor. The overall light is cool and moody, dominated by deep blues and purples, with the luminous beam as the focal contrast point.
foreground: Mechanical automaton construct walking on articulated legs, emitting a blue-purple light beam from a chest-mounted gem
background: Dark stone castle corridor with brick columns and reflective wet stone floor
emotion: alert and purposeful, scanning — no face, but posture implies watchfulness
